summarize_text.name: Summarize Text
summarize_text.trigger_phrase: Hey Alexa, summarize with my watch

webhook_payload.voice_input: Summarize this long article about artificial intelligence and its impact on modern society including machine learning advancements and ethical considerations in autonomous systems

smart_home_lights.name: Control Lights
smart_home_lights.trigger_phrase: Hey Alexa, control lights with my watch

webhook_payload.voice_input: Turn on the living room lights to 50% brightness

smart_home_thermostat.name: Control Thermostat
smart_home_thermostat.trigger_phrase: Hey Alexa, set temperature with my watch

smart_home_security.name: Security Control
smart_home_security.trigger_phrase: Hey Alexa, secure my home with my watch

webhook_payload.voice_input: Lock the front door and arm the security system

set_timer.name: Set Timer
set_timer.trigger_phrase: Hey Alexa, set timer with my watch

webhook_payload.voice_input: Set a timer for 5 minutes for cooking

set_reminder.name: Set Reminder
set_reminder.trigger_phrase: Hey Alexa, remind me with my watch

webhook_payload.voice_input: Remind me to call mom at 3 PM today

get_weather.name: Get Weather
get_weather.trigger_phrase: Hey Alexa, what's the weather on my watch

webhook_payload.voice_input: What's the weather forecast for today

send_notification.name: Send Notification
send_notification.trigger_phrase: Hey Alexa, notify me with my watch

webhook_payload.voice_input: Send notification that I'm running late

steps: Use sample JSON payload from above
webhook_url_sources: Local: Use app's built-in webhook server
Production: Use AWS API Gateway or similar

ngrok_setup.purpose: Expose local webhook server to internet
ngrok_setup.usage: Use ngrok URL in Alexa routine during testing

chatgpt_response.format: Short, concise response suitable for watch display

error_response.format: Clear error message with suggested fix
